name: Ice Comet
description:
Call a comet down from the constellations to blast an enemy, dealing 4620 Frost Damage to all enemies in the area, knocking them down, stunning them for 2 seconds, and reducing their Movement Speed by 50% for 5 seconds. 

After impact, enemies in the target area take 1319 Frost Damage every 1 second for 11 seconds.
